case_title: VIKAS HOTEL, LLC VS. JAMES CHAMPION ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 374 5TH STREET #320, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 30 DAY NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC SERVED OCT-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $3.28. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKAS HOTEL, LLC
